auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ScrapingAnt API key sent as the x-api-key query parameter.

actions.name: extract_content_as_markdown
actions.description: Convert a page into Markdown through ScrapingAnt's Markdown transformation endpoint.

method.description: The HTTP method sent to the target site through ScrapingAnt.

browser.description: Whether ScrapingAnt should render the page in a headless browser.

timeout.description: The maximum upstream request time in seconds.

returnPageSource.description: Whether ScrapingAnt should return the raw server page source without JavaScript rendering.

cookies.description: The cookie string sent to the target site, for example name=value; second=value.

jsSnippet.description: A plain JavaScript snippet that the connector will Base64-encode for ScrapingAnt.

proxyType.description: The proxy network to use for the request.

waitForSelector.description: The CSS selector ScrapingAnt should wait for before returning the result.

blockResource.description: The resource types ScrapingAnt should block while rendering.

customHeaders.description: Custom request headers forwarded to the target page through Ant-* headers.

bodyText.description: A raw text request body forwarded to the target page for POST, PUT, or DELETE requests.

bodyJson.description: A JSON object request body forwarded to the target page for POST, PUT, or DELETE requests.

inputSchema.description: The common ScrapingAnt request parameters supported by the v2 scraping endpoints.

markdown.description: The Markdown content extracted from the target page.

outputSchema.description: The Markdown extraction response returned by ScrapingAnt.

actions.name: extract_data_with_ai
actions.description: Extract structured top-level JSON fields from a page through ScrapingAnt's AI extraction endpoint.

method.description: The HTTP method sent to the target site through ScrapingAnt.

browser.description: Whether ScrapingAnt should render the page in a headless browser.

timeout.description: The maximum upstream request time in seconds.

returnPageSource.description: Whether ScrapingAnt should return the raw server page source without JavaScript rendering.

cookies.description: The cookie string sent to the target site, for example name=value; second=value.

jsSnippet.description: A plain JavaScript snippet that the connector will Base64-encode for ScrapingAnt.

proxyType.description: The proxy network to use for the request.

waitForSelector.description: The CSS selector ScrapingAnt should wait for before returning the result.

blockResource.description: The resource types ScrapingAnt should block while rendering.

customHeaders.description: Custom request headers forwarded to the target page through Ant-* headers.

bodyText.description: A raw text request body forwarded to the target page for POST, PUT, or DELETE requests.

bodyJson.description: A JSON object request body forwarded to the target page for POST, PUT, or DELETE requests.

extractProperties.description: The free-form extraction description that ScrapingAnt will map into top-level JSON fields.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for ScrapingAnt AI extraction.

outputSchema.description: The top-level JSON object returned by ScrapingAnt AI extraction.

actions.name: get_api_credits_usage
actions.description: Read the current ScrapingAnt subscription status and remaining API credits.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving ScrapingAnt API credits usage.

plan_total_credits.description: The total credits available for the active plan.

remained_credits.description: The remaining credits available for the active plan.

outputSchema.description: The credits usage payload returned by ScrapingAnt.

actions.name: scrape_with_extended_json_output
actions.description: Scrape a page through ScrapingAnt's v2 extended endpoint and return HTML, text, cookies, headers, XHRs, and iframes.

method.description: The HTTP method sent to the target site through ScrapingAnt.

browser.description: Whether ScrapingAnt should render the page in a headless browser.

timeout.description: The maximum upstream request time in seconds.

returnPageSource.description: Whether ScrapingAnt should return the raw server page source without JavaScript rendering.

cookies.description: The cookie string sent to the target site, for example name=value; second=value.

jsSnippet.description: A plain JavaScript snippet that the connector will Base64-encode for ScrapingAnt.

proxyType.description: The proxy network to use for the request.

waitForSelector.description: The CSS selector ScrapingAnt should wait for before returning the result.

blockResource.description: The resource types ScrapingAnt should block while rendering.

customHeaders.description: Custom request headers forwarded to the target page through Ant-* headers.

bodyText.description: A raw text request body forwarded to the target page for POST, PUT, or DELETE requests.

bodyJson.description: A JSON object request body forwarded to the target page for POST, PUT, or DELETE requests.

inputSchema.description: The common ScrapingAnt request parameters supported by the v2 scraping endpoints.

cookies.description: The response cookies returned by the target page.

status_code.description: The HTTP status code returned by the target page.

items.description: One HTTP header item returned by ScrapingAnt.

headers.description: The HTTP response headers returned by the target page.

items.description: One HTTP header item returned by ScrapingAnt.

headers.description: The headers captured for the XHR request.

body.description: The response body captured for the XHR request.

request_body.description: The request body captured for the XHR request.

items.description: One XHR or fetch request captured by ScrapingAnt.

xhrs.description: The XHR and fetch requests captured during page rendering.

iframes.description: The iframe payloads captured during page rendering.

outputSchema.description: The extended JSON response returned by ScrapingAnt.
